name: Dirt Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 boxes instant vanilla pudding (3 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cream cheese and margarine until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together one box of instant vanilla pudding with 3 cups of milk until well combined.
3. Add the remaining box of instant vanilla pudding to its milk mixture and combine.
4. Mix in the softened Cool Whip® until evenly incorporated.
5. Crush Oreos in a blender until finely ground.
6. Assemble the cake by layering crushed Oreos at the bottom, followed by the cream cheese and pudding mixture on top.
7. Decorate with silk flowers, plants, or gummy worms as desired.
8. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
